description: Style NoteLightweight knit vest from hanes is crafted with a soft fabric that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The bold shoulder straps helps you show off arm definition while the printed brand label on the inner neck provides abrasion-free comfortProduct DetailsBlack vest with Stretch and Shape Retention technologyBranding appliqued on the back chest regionShaped to Fit contoured body fit styleBroad  shoulder strapsTagless comfortMaterial and Care100% combed ribbed cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursTumble dry low
